name: Almond Brunch Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1/2 cup orange juice, egg, butter, salt, bread flour, sugar, and yeast to a bread machine according to the manufacturer's directions.
2. Select dough cycle.
3. When the dough cycle is complete, remove the dough from the machine. Cover and let rest for 10 minutes.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough into a 24-inch x 8-inch rectangle.
5. In a small mixing bowl, stir together the almond filling (3 tablespoons toasted almonds, chopped, 1 teaspoon grated orange peel), almond filling, almonds, and orange peel.
6. Spread the filling over the dough, leaving about 1/2 inch from the edges.
7. Fold the dough loosely from a short side, making about eight 3-inch wide folds. This is similar to making a jelly roll, except you make wider folds (3 inches).
8. Transfer the rolled dough to a lightly greased baking sheet.
9. On one of the long sides, make eleven 2-1/2-inch cuts from the edge toward the center at about 3/4-inch intervals.
10. Flip every other strip of dough over to the alternate side.
11. Slightly twist each strip, exposing the filling. The loaf will look braided when you are done flipping and twisting.
12. Bake in a 350°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown. If necessary, cover loosely with foil during the last 5 to 10 minutes to prevent overbrowning.
13. Lightly brush the bread surface with orange juice and sprinkle with sugar.
14. Serve warm.
